metadata.title: Obillz — Run your sports club without losing your evenings
metadata.description: Invoices, members, fees, events and payments in one platform built for sports clubs.

hero.title: Run your club without losing your evenings.
hero.subtitle: Invoices, members, membership fees, events and payments in one platform built for sports clubs.
hero.hubBaseline: Your whole club, in one place.

flow.mobileHint: All your tools in one place

problem.title: Clubs waste too much time on admin.
problem.subtitle: Between spreadsheets, WhatsApp messages, fee reminders and invoice tracking, running a club quickly gets messy.

cards.title: Forgotten membership fees
cards.description: Manual reminders, unclear tracking, members paying late.

cards.title: Scattered invoices
cards.description: Excel files, lost emails, no clear view of what's been paid.

cards.title: Overloaded committee
cards.description: WhatsApp, spreadsheets and paperwork — volunteering becomes unmanageable.

cards.title: Poorly tracked events
cards.description: Sign-ups across multiple channels, incomplete lists, no central follow-up.

cards.title: Too many separate tools
cards.description: Excel, WhatsApp, email, shared files… every task has its own tool, nothing connects.

cards.title: Everyone on a different screen
cards.description: Phone, tablet or PC — the committee checks in from everywhere without the same up-to-date view.

modules.label: Features
modules.title: Your whole club in one place.
modules.subtitle: Click a module to explore — the presentation also auto-plays.

membres.title: Members
membres.description: Centralise players, licensed members and committee. Each member has their profile, fees and history in one place.

cotisations.title: Membership fees
cotisations.tagline: Send and track without manual chasing
cotisations.description: Generate season fees, email them out and see instantly who has paid or is still pending.

factures.title: Invoices
factures.description: Create clean invoices for sponsors or suppliers and track payments without leaving Obillz.

planning.title: Scheduling
planning.tagline: Slots and assignments in one place
planning.description: Organise club schedules, bar slots and team assignments from a single calendar.

evenements.title: Events
evenements.description: Tournaments, club dinners, work parties: share a link or QR code and collect every response in one place.

paiements.title: Payments
paiements.description: Fees, bar sales, events: track money in and keep a clear view of club finances.

utilisateurs.title: Users & access
utilisateurs.description: Invite committee members with roles and permissions tailored to each module.

depenses.title: Expenses
depenses.description: Record club expenses and keep readable accounts alongside income and fees.

buvette.title: Bar
buvette.description: Manage bar slots, requests and confirmations for matches and club events.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Manage sponsors, contracts and related invoices without losing track of commitments.

page-publique.title: Public page
page-publique.description: A club web page to present the team, match schedule and useful links for members.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Easy to get started.
howItWorks.subtitle: No need to set everything up at once — go at your own pace, module by module.

steps.title: Create your club
steps.description: A few minutes to set up your workspace.

steps.title: Add your members
steps.description: Import or enter when you want — you can start without a full list.

steps.title: Enable what you need
steps.description: Fees, events, bar, invoices, public page, campaigns… turn on the modules your club needs.

steps.title: Run day to day
steps.description: Send, track, communicate and collect from one dashboard, on desktop or mobile.

askChatGpt.title: Still not sure Obillz is right for your club?
askChatGpt.subtitle: Talk directly with the founder. Ask your questions and find out how Obillz can simplify your club management.
askChatGpt.message: Hello, I'd like to learn more about Obillz.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One plan. Everything included.
pricing.headline: Give your committee a tool worthy of their commitment.
pricing.body: Running a club already takes enough time. Obillz brings members, fees, finances, events, sponsors and committee collaboration together in one easy-to-use platform.
pricing.reassurance: For less than CHF 1.35 per day, centralize your entire club management on a single platform.
pricing.subtitle: {days}-day free trial. All features, one price.
pricing.planDescription: Run your club solo or as a committee — every feature included.
pricing.standardDescription: Main club account — all management features.
pricing.teamDescription: Several committee members, each with their own access.
pricing.footnote: Secure payment via Stripe · Cancel anytime

faq.subtitle: The essentials at a glance, details in one click.

items.question: Is Obillz suitable for all sports clubs?
items.answer: Yes. Football, hockey, tennis, volleyball or local associations: members, fees, invoices, events and schedules in one place.

items.question: How long to set up the club?
items.answer: A few minutes to create your space. Add members and launch your first fees whenever you're ready.

items.question: Do members need to install an app?
items.answer: No. Pay, sign up for events or get info via links and QR codes — no app required.

items.question: What happens after the {days}-day trial?
items.answer: After {days} days, the account becomes read-only. Your data stays visible; editing returns with a subscription.

items.question: What's the difference between Standard and Team?
items.answer: Standard: one account to manage everything. Team: several committee accounts with roles and permissions per module.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, anytime. Access stays active until the end of the paid period.

items.question: Why choose yearly billing?
items.answer: 2 months free compared to monthly — ideal for long-term use.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Secure hosting, protected access and payments via Stripe.

finalCta.title: Your club deserves better than a spreadsheet.
finalCta.subtitle: Centralise your management and save time starting now.
finalCta.loginPrompt: Already have an account? Log in

footer.description: Software to run your sports club: members, fees, invoices, events and payments — all in one place.
footer.swissMade: Built for sports clubs in Switzerland
footer.trialNote: {days}-day free trial · No credit card required to start
